title: EVA Pod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:EVApod-CWSW365.png|thumb|right|250px|An EVA Pod in the junkyard behind Watto's Shop]]
The '''EVA Pod<ref name="ItWoSWEI" />''' was a type of vehicle present in the junkyard behind [[Wald's Parts|Watto's Shop]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name=":0">{{Film|I}}</ref> It had previously been a repair and maintenance vehicle pod of unknown origin.<ref name="ItWoSWEI">''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The EVA Pod is actually a replica of a famous prop from the [[1960s|1968]] film [[Wikipedia:2001: A Space Odyssey|''2001: A Space Odyssey'']], which resembled one of the designs of the then-recently proposed [[Wikipedia:FlexCraft|FlexCraft]] by N.A.S.A.. It was put in the background of Watto's junkyard in ''The Phantom Menace'' as a visual [[Easter egg (virtual)|Easter egg]].<ref name=":0" />
